plain_language.en: Open surgical repair of a belly button hernia
plain_language.es: Reparación quirúrgica abierta de hernia umbilical
plain_language.hi: नाभि की हर्निया की खुली सर्जरी द्वारा मरम्मत
plain_language.pt: Reparação cirúrgica aberta de hérnia umbilical

notes: Open umbilical hernia repair, initial, patient 5 years or older.
